name: Barbecued Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the shrimp and garlic salt.
2. Add celery salt, worcestershire sauce, oil, thyme, cayenne, rosemary, beef extract, and chervil to the bowl with the shrimp. Stir until well mixed.
3. Pour the mixture over the shrimp in a casserole dish.
4. Refrigerate the marinated shrimp for at least one hour, preferably overnight.
5. Before baking, bring the shrimp back to room temperature.
6. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
7. Bake the shrimp in the preheated oven for about 20 minutes, or until cooked through for 3 pounds of shrimp. For larger quantities, bake for a little longer.
